name: Cheesy Mushroom Canapes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt butter over low heat.
2. Add mushrooms and cook gently for 2 minutes until softened.
3. Stir in flour and continue cooking for another minute.
4. Add cheese, mustard powder, Worcestershire sauce, and pepper. Stir well.
5. Cook the mixture gently for an additional 2 minutes or until the cheese begins to melt.
6. Preheat broiler.
7. Toast bread slices on one side only.
8. Spread the mushroom and cheese mixture onto the untoasted sides of the bread.
9. Broil the bread in the preheated broiler for 3-4 minutes, or until melted and bubbly.
10. Cut each slice in half and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley and paprika.
11. Garnish with parsley sprigs if desired, and serve hot.
